title: EHS Audits
shortDescription: Comprehensive Environment, Health & Safety audits for regulatory compliance.
fullDescription: Our EHS Audits provide a systematic, documented, and periodic evaluation of your organization's environment, health, and safety performance. We identify potential hazards, evaluate compliance with applicable laws and regulations, and provide actionable recommendations for improvement.

title: ISO 45001
shortDescription: Occupational Health and Safety management systems audit and guidance.
fullDescription: Prepare your organization for ISO 45001 certification. Our auditors evaluate your OHSMS against ISO standards, highlighting gaps and helping you implement a robust framework for managing occupational health and safety risks and opportunities.

title: Workplace Safety Audit
shortDescription: Detailed assessment of general workplace safety and hazard identification.
fullDescription: A comprehensive walkthrough and evaluation of your workplace to identify physical, chemical, biological, and ergonomic hazards. We focus on enhancing safety culture and reducing workplace accidents through proactive identification.

title: School Audits
shortDescription: Specialized safety audits tailored for educational institutions and campuses.
fullDescription: Ensuring the safety of students and staff is paramount. Our school safety audits cover perimeter security, fire safety, playground equipment, laboratory safety, and emergency evacuation protocols tailored for educational environments.

title: Fire Safety Audit
shortDescription: Thorough fire safety assessments and risk analysis for buildings.
fullDescription: Our fire safety audits involve a thorough inspection of fire detection systems, suppression equipment, evacuation readiness, and compliance with local fire codes. We provide detailed risk ratings and prioritize corrective actions.

title: Electrical Safety Audit
shortDescription: Identifying electrical hazards and ensuring system integrity and compliance.
fullDescription: Prevent electrical fires and accidents. We evaluate electrical infrastructure, including earthing systems, circuit breakers, and wiring integrity, ensuring compliance with national electrical standards and safety guidelines.

title: Warehouse Safety Audit
shortDescription: Optimizing safety in storage, logistics, and material handling environments.
fullDescription: Focusing on racking stability, material handling equipment (MHE) safety, traffic management, and warehouse ergonomics. We help prevent common warehouse accidents and optimize storage safety protocols.

title: Event Safety Audit
shortDescription: Safety planning and on-site audit services for large events and gatherings.
fullDescription: From crowd management to temporary structures, our event safety audits ensure that your gatherings are safe for attendees and staff. We cover risk assessments, emergency planning, and on-site compliance monitoring.

title: Emergency Preparedness Audit
shortDescription: Evaluating response readiness for fires, natural disasters, and crises.
fullDescription: Is your team ready for the unexpected? We audit your emergency response plans, evacuation procedures, and communication systems to ensure maximum readiness in the event of a crisis or disaster.

title: 2W/4W/HMV Vehicles Audit
shortDescription: Technical and safety inspections for all fleet vehicle types.
fullDescription: Comprehensive safety audits for Two-Wheelers, Four-Wheelers, and Heavy Motor Vehicles. We inspect vehicle condition, safety equipment, and driver documentation to ensure fleet reliability and road safety.

title: Road Safety Audit
shortDescription: Evaluating road infrastructure and internal site traffic safety.
fullDescription: A systematic checkout of road safety during design, construction, and operation. We identify potential safety problems for all road users and internal site traffic managed by your organization.

title: Journey Risk Management
shortDescription: Planning and auditing journey routes to minimize transportation risks.
fullDescription: Identifying risks associated with specific transportation routes. We audit route choices, rest stops, terrain hazards, and communication needs to ensure safe and efficient journeys for your drivers and cargo.

title: Forklift/Crane Inspection
shortDescription: Third-party safety inspections for specialized material handling equipment.
fullDescription: Regular safety inspections for forklifts, cranes, and other lifting equipment. We ensure mechanical integrity, safety device functionality, and compliance with manufacturer and regulatory standards.

title: Confined Space Inspection
shortDescription: Safety audits for high-risk work in tanks, pipes, and confined areas.
fullDescription: Auditing entrance protocols, atmospheric monitoring, and emergency rescue setups for confined space work. We ensure that all required safety measures are strictly adhered to in high-risk environments.

title: Construction Site Inspection
shortDescription: On-site safety compliance monitoring for construction projects.
fullDescription: Continuous or periodic safety inspections for construction sites. We cover excavation safety, work at height, heavy machinery operation, and general site safety compliance to prevent project accidents.

title: Scaffolding Inspection
shortDescription: Technical safety audits for scaffolding structures and work platforms.
fullDescription: Ensuring structural integrity and safe use of scaffolding systems. Our inspectors check for proper assembly, load limits, stability, and fall protection measures across all types of scaffolding setup.
